segments.text: SPEAKER 1:Thank you for calling the free Travelite Travel Agency Information Line.
segments.translation: 发言人1：感谢你往Travelite旅行社拨打免费的咨询电话，

segments.text: You will not be charged for this call.
segments.translation: 这条通话将不收取费用。

segments.text: In order to deal with all calls effectively, we offer you a number of options.
segments.translation: 为了更有效的处理每条通话，我们为你提供几个选择。

segments.text: Please listen carefully and press your required number at the appropriate time, or dial a new number.
segments.translation: 请仔细听好并在适当的时间按下相应的号码，或拨打新号码。

segments.text: If you want to hear about special offers, please press one.
segments.translation: 如果你想了解特价活动，请拨一。

segments.text: If you want to hear our latest price lists, please press two.
segments.translation: 如果你想了解我们最新的报价单，请拨二。

segments.text: If you want to make a complaint, please press three.
segments.translation: 如果你想投诉，请拨三。

segments.text: If you want information about our new walking holidays, please press four now.
segments.translation: 如果你想了解我们的徒步旅行，现在请拨四。

segments.text: SPEAKER 2:Thank you for calling our Travelite Walking Holidays Line.
segments.translation: 发言人2：感谢你往Travelite徒步旅行拨打电话。

segments.text: We have been offering a wide variety of walking holidays to suit all tastes for just three years, but already we have won two awards for excellence in this field.
segments.translation: 三年我们为不同爱好者提供了各种各样的徒步旅行，在这一领域我们已经取得了两项卓越奖。

segments.text: We offer guided walking tours to suit the discerning traveller in twelve different centres throughout the whole of Western Europe.
segments.translation: 我们在遍布整个西欧的12家不同的中心为独具慧眼的旅行者提供适合的徒步旅行指导。

segments.text: We are planning to open our first centre outside this area in the coming year, so watch out for developments.
segments.translation: 我们明年计划在这些地方以外开辟首家中心，所以请关注我们的发展。

segments.text: But the pride of Travelite is the level of guidance and support we offer on our walks.
segments.translation: 但是Travelite骄傲的是我们提供给顾客最好的指导和支持。

segments.text: All are planned in detail by our highly trained guides, who all work in a variety of different Travelite locations, so we can guarantee standards.
segments.translation: 一切都由我们受过高度训练的指导员详细安排，他们在Travelite的各个地区工作，所以我们的水准可以受到保证。

segments.text: Each day we offer three separate walks catering for all skills and fitness levels.
segments.translation: 每天我们提供3种不同的徒步计划来迎合各种技能和健康水平的人。

segments.text: We also pride ourselves on our friendly service, particularly important for the increasing numbers of people who choose to holiday alone.
segments.translation: 我们还为自己热情的服务感到自豪，这特别是对越来越多只身度假的人很重要。

segments.text: Unlike almost all travel operators who happily charge large supplements for single rooms, we guarantee that no single client will pay more, even when only double rooms are available for them.
segments.translation: 我们不像其他所有旅行机构一样对使用单人房的人索取高额费用，

segments.text: And the day doesn't end with the return to base … after our dinner at communal tables designed to make all our guests feel part of a family atmosphere … Entertainment is laid on nearly every night with tour leaders on hand to organise lectures, games, quizzes and respond to any special requests from guests.
segments.translation: 并且我们的行程不是在回到基地那天就终止了。在公共餐桌吃完晚餐后让所有客人都能感受到家庭的气氛，几乎每晚我们的领队都会安排娱乐节目，讲座、游戏、竞答和回应客人的特殊要求。

segments.text: The following is a summary of costs and special inclusive offers on holidays for the coming summer.
segments.translation: 接下来的是这个即将到来的夏季假期成本和特殊报价的总结。

segments.text: We have three lengths of holiday: three-day, seven-day and fourteen-day.
segments.translation: 我们有三种时间跨度的假期：3天、7天、14天。

segments.text: The three-day holiday costs one hundred and eighty dollars for all accommodation, food and walking, and for the first time this year we are including in that price... the cost of picking you up from the nearest station.
segments.translation: 三天的假期需要180美元，其中包括食宿、徒步费用，并且我们今年第一次涵盖了从最近的车站接你的费用。

segments.text: The seven-day holiday costs three hundred and fifty dollars per person and, as well as including the offers of the three-day holiday, also includes a magnificent book giving the local history.
segments.translation: 七天的假期每人需要350美元，除了包括三天假期的内容外，还送你一本精美的介绍当地历史的书。

segments.text: On top of that, we are able to include free maps ... for you to better enjoy the walking and even plan in advance if you wish.
segments.translation: 不仅如此，我们还有免费地图。如果你愿意，你可以更好的享受徒步旅行甚至提前做好计划。

segments.text: For the fourteen-day holiday, our special price is six hundred and ninety dollars per person and that includes all the offers for the three- and seven- day holidays plus … membership of a local walking club ... so you can better enjoy the full flavour of the local life.
segments.translation: 我们十四天假期的特价是每人690美元，这不仅包括三天和七天的内容，还包括当地徒步俱乐部的会员资格。这样你就能更好的享受各种各样的当地生活。

segments.text: For further information, please contact your local travel agent.
segments.translation: 想要了解更多信息，请联系当地旅行社。

segments.text: Thank you for calling the Travelite Travel Agency Information Line ... (fade out)
segments.translation: 感谢你致电Travelite旅行社咨询电话......（淡出）
